_source: OSM way/220773458 (ODbL) + NHS jpaget.nhs.uk + NaPTAN bus stop survey. Coords from OSM unless noted.
name: James Paget University Hospital
nhs_trust: James Paget University Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
icb: NHS Norfolk and Waveney Integrated Care Board

road_access.approach_north: Breydon Bridge → A47 south signed Gorleston/Lowestoft, hospital on right
road_access.approach_south: A12/A47 north from Lowestoft/Ipswich, hospital on left
road_access.notes: Main vehicle entrance is a signalised junction on the A47. Entrance road runs west into the campus.

entrances.label: Main vehicle entrance (A47 junction)
entrances.notes: Signalised junction on A47 Lowestoft Road. Access road bears right toward main drop-off, left toward Car Parks A & B.

entrances.label: Main entrance (pedestrian / drop-off)
entrances.coord_source: OSM hospital way centroid — precise entrance not yet surveyed
entrances.notes: Front of main building. 10-minute free drop-off bay directly outside. Extended 30-min free for patients requiring assistance.

entrances.label: A&E / Emergency Department entrance
entrances.coord_source: Inferred — south-east corner of main building, opposite NaPTAN bus stop Stand A (52.561014,1.719799)
entrances.notes: Dedicated A&E entrance at front of hospital, south-east corner. Ambulance bays immediately adjacent. Bus stop Stand A is forecourt-side opposite ambulance bays.

entrances.label: Community Diagnostic Centre drop-off
entrances.notes: 30-minute max free parking. EV charging (2 bays, paid). Orthopaedic Centre adjacent.

car_parks.label: Car Parks A & B (main visitor)
car_parks.notes: Front of hospital, left after entering from A47. Blue badge spaces front row of Car Park A, free. Motorcycle bays near exit barrier, free.

bus_stops.label: James Paget Hospital, Stand A
bus_stops.notes: On-site forecourt stop, opposite ambulance bays. Routes X1, 1, 1A.

bus_stops.label: James Paget Hospital, adj (Lowestoft Rd northbound)
James Paget Hospital, opp (Lowestoft Rd southbound)

delivery.internal_road_notes: Access road from A47 junction is two-lane. Bear right at first island for main entrance / drop-off. Bear left for Car Parks A & B. Speed bumps throughout campus.
delivery.turning_notes: Turning circle at 52.563544,1.715789 (north of campus, Brasenose Avenue end).
